text: Code reviews are an essential practice in software development. When developers examine each other's code, they can catch bugs early, before the issues reach production. This saves time and prevents costly errors. Beyond finding mistakes, code reviews also promote knowledge sharing within a team. Team members learn new techniques and different approaches to solving problems. As a result, the entire team improves its skills and produces higher quality work. In short, regular code reviews not only make software more reliable but also build a stronger, more collaborative team.
